description_long: This is a rectangular banner featuring Arabic calligraphy in a prominent, elegant script across its front face. The background is a gradient blend of deep red on the right and rich blue on the left, with a subtle texture that gives the surface a slightly uneven, painted appearance. The calligraphy is rendered in a contrasting light color, possibly white or silver, making it stand out sharply against the colored background. The banner appears to be made from a solid, flat panel, likely wood or a composite material, with a smooth but slightly textured finish. The edges are clean and straight, and there are no visible mounting fixtures or supports. The reverse side is plain, showing only the gradient color without any text or decoration.
description: A rectangular banner with Arabic calligraphy on a red-to-blue gradient background, featuring a textured, solid panel construction. The calligraphy is in a light color, contrasting with the vibrant background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Arabic calligraphy and the red-blue gradient background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile of the banner and the edge coloration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the gradient background without any calligraphy or decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and edge details.
